summary: Start M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 after M6-BATCH-AUTORUN-BALANCE-DASHBOARD-001 is CLOSED on origin/main. The gameplay_designer must collect bounded, local/privacy-safe adviser intervention evidence for Alpha flows without modifying product code, adding telemetry, collecting personal data, deciding M6 exit, or reopening manual node battle.

tests_run.result: Clean on research/m6-adviser-intervention-evidence before start checkpoint.

decisions: Start M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 as the highest-priority dependency-ready M6 task after M6-BATCH-AUTORUN-BALANCE-DASHBOARD-001 closure PR entered origin/main.
Evidence task is process/research-only inside allowed files; apps, packages, content-source, tools, CI, roadmap, acceptance matrix, prior gate docs, manifests, and release artifacts are forbidden.
Evidence must distinguish useful, ignored, harmful, and missing adviser interventions using anonymized/local observation or deterministic run review only.
Blockers and bounded follow-ups must be recorded without adding telemetry, personal data, external research, product scope, or M6 exit decision.
Cultural or historical concerns must be tagged and routed to historical_researcher or Human Gate before formal content acceptance.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and is not reopened by this task.
risks: R3 evidence task may overclaim from limited observation; record session/run count and explicit limits.
Adviser text can touch cultural/historical interpretation; tag concerns instead of accepting formal content inside this task.
No product code changes are allowed; any required adviser behavior change must become a separate allowed implementation task.
requested_action: Collect bounded adviser intervention evidence within allowed paths, update task/status evidence, run required process checks, and emit a REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer.
